agents.purpose: Create and enforce semantic names linked by Window_Page_Control_Module ownership.
workflow: Map ownership chain: window -> page -> control -> module.
Generate names for folder, registry, object path, and function scope.
Apply naming in one pass without deferred cleanup.
Sync alias dictionary when abbreviations are introduced or changed.
Run lint/test/refactor gate.

agents.purpose: Keep renderer wrapper-focused and dispatch-first while extracting domain logic.
workflow: Select extraction slice by domain ownership.
Move logic to module with linked naming chain.
Replace wrappers with dispatch-object calls.
Align extracted keys with group_sets and dispatch specs.
Run lint/test/refactor gate.

agents.purpose: Keep bootstrap orchestration-only and split hook metadata by scope.
workflow: Define app/window/page/control pre_load/post_load ownership.
Extract hook specs into scope-specific files.
Preserve deterministic hook order and required metadata.
Keep bootstrap file orchestration-only.
Run lint/test/refactor gate.
blocking_checks: No inline hook-spec blobs in bootstrap

agents.purpose: Remove hardcoded text and action duplication using shared factories and pattern maps.
workflow: Identify repeated literals/actions.
Move shared strings/maps to PATTERN_* constants.
Use factory helpers for label/action generation.
Retain existing UI behavior and text output.
Run lint/test/refactor gate.
blocking_checks: No repeated hardcoded labels in targeted blocks

agents.purpose: Analyze agents/skills, compare old-vs-new methods, and produce alternatives for handoff.
workflow: Inventory current skills, agents, and routing contracts.
Build old-vs-new comparison with alternatives and tradeoffs.
Generate structured decision packet with required file-level edits.
Handoff to Agent Skill Decider Agent.
blocking_checks: Required edit intents map to real files

agents.purpose: Select the final approach from reviewer output and edit skills/agents metadata.
workflow: Validate reviewer packet and select recommended alternative.
Apply edits to SKILL.md, agent yaml, routing, and workflow registries.
Run lint/test/refactor gate as blocking completion checks.
blocking_checks: Naming and alias sync requirements satisfied

agents.purpose: Bridge code, pseudocode, and plain-English language artifacts into searchable dictionary-linked state.
workflow: Capture user/assistant and dictionary source text.
Extract code tokens, pseudocode phrases, and english terms.
Build keyword index, triad map, and glossary artifacts.
Link artifacts to entry/document IDs in bridge state.
Run lint/test/refactor gate.

agents.purpose: Direct default project execution with minimal hierarchy: blueprint, language selection, polyglot translation, optimization, and strict benchmark/security gating.
workflow: Capture requirements, constraints, platform targets, and quality priorities.
Dispatch directly to pseudo-blueprint-planner-agent for complete English+pseudocode blueprint.
Dispatch directly to language-fit-selector-agent for weighted language scorecard and candidate set.
Dispatch directly to pseudocode-polyglot-translator-agent for per-language implementation mapping.
Dispatch directly to polyglot-quality-benchmark-agent for strict tests, hardening, and SxS benchmarks.
Recommend primary/fallback languages using measured runtime/size/security effectiveness.
Block completion when any stage artifact or gate result is missing/failing.
blocking_checks: Blueprint artifact exists and is complete
Language scorecard includes weighted rankings and eliminations
Per-language translation parity matrix is present
Strict validation + SxS benchmark reports pass

agents.purpose: Produce full English and pseudocode application blueprints for downstream polyglot generation.
workflow: Convert requirements into scope, domain model, module map, and contracts.
Generate deterministic pseudocode for core logic and failure paths.
Define language-neutral acceptance tests and risk register.
Publish blueprint package for translator and benchmark stages.

agents.purpose: Rank and select project languages using weighted runtime/size/portability/security/maintainability scoring.
workflow: Detect installed toolchains and platform compatibility boundaries.
Score candidate languages against weighted project criteria.
Select primary/fallback/benchmark language sets and record eliminations.

agents.purpose: Translate pseudocode contracts into equivalent implementations and tests across selected languages.
workflow: Parse pseudocode into typed function contracts.
Generate per-language implementations with shared behavior contracts.
Generate per-language tests from shared fixtures.
Publish parity matrix and known deviations.
blocking_checks: Parity matrix covers all translated functions

agents.purpose: Run strict correctness, hardening, and side-by-side benchmark gates for all language variants.
workflow: Run lint/build/test/security checks per language variant.
Run runtime and artifact-size SxS benchmarks.
Apply optimization/fix loops and re-run checks.
Publish ranked effectiveness report with metric winners.
blocking_checks: SxS runtime and size report is complete
